take man page
south
look
take alias shield
equip alias shield
east
look
take grep tool
take kill nine
equip kill nine
west
west
look
take pipe connector
attack
attack
attack
attack
attack
attack
south
look
south
attack
attack
attack
attack
attack
attack
attack
attack
attack
south
look
take root shell
quit
